case_title: DL LAW GROUP VS. RUSSELL A. ROBINSON et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER FOR TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER; ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
REPLY BRIEF IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FOR PRELINMINARY INJUNCTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF DL LAW GROUP

LAW AND MOTION 302, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS GRANTED. THE UNDISPUTED EVIDENCE INDICATES THAT PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO $82,125. DEFENDANT SHALL DEPOSIT THAT SUM WITH THE COURT BY 4:00 P.M. ON APRIL 8, 2013. ALTERNATIVELY, DEFENDANT CAN REMIT THE MONEY DIRECTLY TO PLAINTIFF AT THE HEARING. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER #5976.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: CONTEMPT; MEMO P/A; DECLARATION OF CONOR GRANAHAN FILED BY PLAINTIFF DL LAW GROUP
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-26-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO APRIL 8, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THE TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER WILL REMAIN IN EFFECT UNTIL AFTER THE HEARING ON APRIL 8, 2013. THE PARTIES MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION AND REPLY PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN MARCH 26, 2013 AT 4:00. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER #5976.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-15-2013 Off Calendar

Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Apr-08-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: CONAR GRANAHAN, ESQ. AND DAVID M. LILIENSTEIN, ESQ., 415.830.3325 AND 415.271.7169, FOR PLAINTIFF DL LAW GROUP; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction IS GRANTED. The undisputed evidence indicates that plaintiff is entitled to $82,125. Defendant shall deposit that sum with the Court by 4:00 p.m. on April 8, 2013. Alternatively, defendant can remit the money directly to plaintiff at the hearing. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Mar-26-2013 Continued To Apr-08-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction is Continued on the court's own motion to April 8, 2013 to give Plaintiff and Defendant the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. The Temporary Restraining Order will remain in effect until after the hearing on April 8, 2013. The parties must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition and reply papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than March 26, 2013 at 4:00. The court has courtesy copies of the moving papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.
